France	1860, 1872, 1881, 1910, 1947/48, 1957/68, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
Germany	1853, 1862, 1873, 1891–94, 1951, 1957/68, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
Italy	1861, 1863, 1950, 1957/68, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
UK	1853, 1860, 1947/48, 1960, 1967, 1973/78, 1979, 1994/95, 2021
 
Netherlands	1862, 1924, 1948, 1957/68, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
Japan	1899, 1911, 1955, 1961, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
Sweden	1850s/1860s, 1950, 1960, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
Belgium	1921/22, 1948, 1957/68, 1967, 1979, 1994/95
 
Portugal	1960, 1962, 1972, 1986, 1994/95
 
Switzerland	1960, 1966, 1972, 1994/95, 2024; optional cautious add: 1864
 
Spain	1869, 1963, 1970/73, 1986/93, 1994/95
 
Argentina	1967, 1991/95, 1994/95
 
Brazil	1948, 1991/95, 1994/95
 
Mexico	1986, 1994, 1994/95; optional implementation endpoints: 2003/08
